text:
Created attachment 159648
Build log for gnome-nibbles

After the Gnome3 update to 3.16 some ports fail to build due to issues with the clutter-gtk3 including multimedia/totem and games/gnome-nibbles. Both fail due to missing linkabes and I am guessing are from a common problem with the new clutter-gtk3 port.

Full build logs attached.
